name: Pamela N. Maggied CO., LPA
description_short: Pamela N. Maggied CO., LPA is a credit repair provider based in Columbus, Ohio. Rated 4.9/5 with 10 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Pamela N. Maggied CO., LPA is a credit repair provider serving clients in Columbus, Ohio. Carrying a 4.9/5.0 Google rating from 10 reviews, Pamela N. Maggied CO., LPA has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Columbus area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a attorney, bankruptcy attorney, Pamela N. Maggied CO., LPA provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Columbus, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Pamela N. Maggied CO., LPA operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Columbus, Ohio area who are considering Pamela N. Maggied CO., LPA should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
